metadata.title: Produce a governed srx_ace_workflow artifact for blueprint_design_doc using the sovereign_lens, handling chaotic input with depth_tier_ambiguity and explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a governed srx_ace_workflow artifact for blueprint_design_doc using the sovereign_lens, handling chaotic input with depth_tier_ambiguity and explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Workflow artifact is valid srx_ace_workflow type.; All sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and compilable.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.; Chaotic input is resolved without loss of governance.

in_scope.item: Parse messy input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) into a structured workflow with validation gates. Output must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Workflow artifact is valid srx_ace_workflow type.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and compilable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Chaotic input is resolved without loss of governance.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.workflow_objective: Produce a governed srx_ace_workflow artifact for blueprint_design_doc using the sovereign_lens, handling chaotic input with depth_tier_ambiguity and explicit validation gates.

workflow_phases.item: Parse messy input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) into a structured workflow with validation gates. Output must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

validation_gates.item: Workflow artifact is valid srx_ace_workflow type.
All sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and compilable.
Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.
Chaotic input is resolved without loss of governance.

receipt_contract.item: compiled_intent: objective: Produce a governed srx_ace_workflow artifact for blueprint_design_doc using the sovereign_lens, handling chaotic input with depth_tier_ambiguity and explicit validation gates.; scope: Parse messy input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) into a structured workflow with validation gates. Output must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.; constraints: Must use sovereign_lens for governance and validation.; Must include explicit validation gates at each workflow step.; Must handle depth_tier_ambiguity by resolving to D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE.; Output must be strict JSON with no markdown fences.; Must not claim completion if any blocker exists.; success_criteria: Workflow artifact is valid srx_ace_workflow type.; All sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and compilable.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.; Chaotic input is resolved without loss of governance.; output_contract: This JSON object.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
